title: Smart & whimscape
description: Smart & Whimscape is an optimized pack combining Whimscape textures, helper mods, and smooth interface and entity animations.
body:
# 🌟 Smart & Whimscape

A Minecraft modpack that combines **Action & Stuff** style animations with **Whimscape** textures to make them look cohesive. 

---

## 🎬 Visuals & Animations
* **Action & Stuff Style:** Features smooth player and entity animations on Java Edition.
* **Whimscape Textures:** Resource pack textures carefully combined to match the animation style.

## 🛠️ Helper Mods
Includes useful modifications for more comfortable gameplay, such as:
* **Xaero's Minimap** (convenient world navigation)
* **AppleSkin** (food and hunger HUD indicators)
* *And other quality-of-life mods...*

## ⚡ Performance
* Features built-in optimization to ensure stable performance and consistent FPS.
